title: The Arrival
narrative: The tunnel from the Hog's Head spills you into the Room of Requirement. The castle shakes — a curse has already struck the ramparts. Remus Lupin looks around at the assembled fighters: students, Order members, Hogwarts staff. McGonagall is issuing assignments. Then a silver Patronus streaks in — a fox, Tonks's — and speaks in her voice: 'Astronomy Tower stairs. Two Death Eaters. I'm holding them.' Remus's jaw tightens. The main line needs fighters too. He has seconds to decide.

options.text: Go to Tonks — fight together. She shouldn't be holding a staircase alone.
options.feedback_hint: Remus reaches Tonks in time. Together they repel both Death Eaters from the staircase and hold the tower approach.

options.text: Trust Tonks to hold. Rush to the main entrance line where fighters are needed most.
options.feedback_hint: Tonks holds for now — but alone and under pressure, she's exposed to anything that comes from above.

options.text: Wait for McGonagall's assignment. Act as a coordinated unit, not alone.
options.feedback_hint: Hesitation costs seconds that Tonks doesn't have. By the time an assignment comes, reinforcements are already too late to the Tower.

free_text.prompt: Where do you go and why?

categories.label: Go to Tonks, help her, fight together, join her on the Astronomy Tower
Go to the main battle, entrance, great hall, or front without going to Tonks
Wait, hesitate, seek orders, delay going anywhere

free_text.llm_classification_criteria: Classify into exactly one category. GO_TO_TONKS when the player chooses to go to Tonks or the Astronomy Tower, alone or with others. FRONT_LINE when the player goes to the main battle or entrance without prioritising Tonks. WAIT_ORDERS when the player hesitates, seeks orders, or does not commit to moving. INVALID for off-topic or nonsense.
